ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing brand */,
  "brand_country" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for brand inquiries */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* URL to the brand's official website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Shirts, Pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* File path to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size record */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand offering the size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement guide */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the guide relates to */,
  "guide_description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement guide */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the guide document */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the guide is written */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the guide was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_guides_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size variant */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the standard size */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., Slim Fit, Regular Fit) */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "variant_image" TEXT /* File path to an image representing the variant */,
  "variant_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_variants_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer about the size fit */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (1 to 5) */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size variant */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "customer_location" TEXT /* Location of the customer providing feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES size_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the system */,
  "customer_location" TEXT /* Location of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the standard size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for conversion */,
  "converted_size" TEXT /* Converted size in the region's standard */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the converted size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size trend */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size associated with the trend */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of sales for the size */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend observed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the trend is relevant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size data that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., Update, Delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost for the shipping method */,
  "estimated_delivery" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the shipping method */,
  "minimum_order_amount" REAL /* Minimum order amount required for the shipping method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping method selected */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order is being shipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_id") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that this item belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of the order */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity currently available in stock */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock for the item */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
